title: Nothing OS 4.1(FroggerPro-B4.1-260522-1414-JPN)
description:
What's New in This Update

Camera Enhancements

🎥 4K 60FPS recording is now available on main and telephoto cameras, for smoother footage.
🛠️ Enhanced camera stability for smoother video zoom and time-lapse experience.

General Improvements and Bug Fixes

📱 Optimised maximum font size display to prevent text from overlapping in the UI.
⌚ Optimised the compatibility with certain wearable devices.
⚙️ Enhanced overall system stability.
🛡️ Updated to May 2026 security patch.

Notes:
Your device may use more power and feel warmer during installation. Performance will return to normal after the update is complete.
